title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Define core entities like URL and domain logic for shortening and expanding URLs.
steps.done_condition: Domain logic for URL shortening and expanding is implemented and tested.

steps.description: Create port interfaces for incoming requests and command responses.
steps.done_condition: Port interfaces for handling API requests and responses are defined and tested.

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage solution for storing URL mappings.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage functionality for URL mappings is implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Develop the HTTP server handler to process incoming REST API calls.
steps.done_condition: HTTP server handler is set up to process API calls for URL shortening and retrieval, with tests passing.

steps.description: Implement use case logic to compose ports for application behavior.
steps.done_condition: Use case logic connecting domain and ports is implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Wire adapters to ports in the composition root.
steps.done_condition: Composition root correctly wires together all components to allow for API operation.

successCriteria: API successfully shortens and retrieves URLs.
All implemented features are covered with unit tests.
In-memory storage works as intended without errors.
